title: linaria alpina subsp. guarensis
intro: Linaria alpina subsp. guarensis, also known as the Alpine Toadflax, is a rare, alpine plant species of the Linaria genus. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Linaria alpina subsp. guarensis is often used in infusions, teas, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
